name: Nordea Invest Europa Small Cap
summary: Nordea Invest Europa Small Cap is an open ended equity mutual fund launched and managed by Nordea Invest Fund Management A/s. The fund invests in the public equity markets of Europe. It invests in stocks of companies operating across diversified sectors. The fund invests in stocks of small cap companies. It benchmarks the performance of its portfolio against the MSCI Europe Small Cap Index. Nordea Invest Europa Small Cap was formed on March 5, 1997 and is domiciled in Denmark.
